headline: 10x Genomics, Cleveland Clinic Team Up on Bladder Cancer Diagnostics
summary: TXG collaborates with the Cleveland Clinic to advance bladder cancer diagnostics using Flex Apex, Xenium and potentially Atera.

headline: Baxter's Unit Synovis MCA to Lead Global Rollout of the SHIYA Platform
summary: BAX gains as Synovis MCA signs a multi-year deal to commercialize MediThinQ's SHIYA 3D surgical visualization platform worldwide.

headline: CAH Stock Up Nearly 8% YTD: Will the Uptrend Continue in the Rest of 2026?
summary: Cardinal Health has gained nearly 8% in 2026 as specialty pharma growth, rising EPS, and expanding healthcare services fuel investor optimism.
